actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / staggered-Wilson determinant positivity is useful positivity-preservation support, not PR230 y_t closure
conditional_surface_status: If supplemented by a same-surface theorem upgrading positivity preservation to primitive positivity improvement in the neutral scalar response sector, or by O_H/C_sH/C_HH rows, determinant positivity would be relevant support for the bridge.
exact_next_action: Use determinant positivity only as measure/positivity-preservation support.  Continue PR230 through a real neutral primitive-cone certificate, canonical O_H plus C_sH/C_HH rows, same-source W/Z rows, or strict production FH/LSZ plus matching.

parent_statuses.derived_bridge_rank_one: exact negative boundary / derived rank-one bridge not closed on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.full_positive_assembly: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.neutral_positivity_direct: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar positivity-improving direct theorem not derived
parent_statuses.neutral_primitive_cone: exact-support / neutral-scalar primitive-cone certificate gate; strict irreducibility certificate absent
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.source_sector_transfer: bounded-support / SU3 source-sector pattern is relevant to PR230 as a bridge-computation method, not as source-only y_t closure

positive_vs_primitive_counterexample.lesson: Configuration-by-configuration determinant positivity is compatible with a reducible positive neutral scalar response sector.

proposal_allowed_reason: The determinant bridge gives configuration-by-configuration positive fermion measure on a symmetric-canonical surface; it does not define canonical O_H, produce C_sH/C_HH rows, prove neutral primitive-cone irreducibility, or exclude orthogonal neutral scalar top coupling.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained top-Yukawa closure
does not use determinant positivity as y_t, O_H, or kappa_s
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, or observed targets
does not treat positivity preservation as positivity improvement
